title: Default Dark Tool Trims
description: Adds a Dark Mode GUI to the Toolsmithing Table from Tool Trims
body:
> This project is now also included in [Default Dark Mode: Expansion](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode-expansion)


## Description
This resource pack adds a dark mode UI in the style of **Default Dark Mode** to the Toolsmithing Table from **Tool Trims**

## Credits
- [Default Dark Mode](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/default-dark-mode) by nebulr
- [Tool Trims](https://modrinth.com/datapack/tool-trims) by JoeFly
